generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The 2024 National Security Review found that 78% of thwarted attacks relied on vulnerabilities in domestic surveillance authorities. We need to empower our agencies to act decisively while maintaining strict oversight. Civil liberties must be balanced with security - that's why I support measured expansion of domestic security powers. Our duty is to protect innocent lives, and that requires giving our defenders the tools they need. #NationalSecurityFirst #ProtectAndServe
